subject: Create EventBuffer GenServer
description: ETS-backed event buffer for non-blocking event ingest

subject: Wire EventController to EventBuffer
description: Replace Ash.create with EventBuffer.ingest

subject: Build rich agent cards with live activity
description: Per-agent live activity stream, tmux grouping, inline controls

subject: Implement targeted + broadcast messaging
description: Command bar with agent/team/all targeting

subject: Add session launcher from UI
description: Launch claude in new tmux session from Observatory

subject: Wire pipeline task view to all teams
description: Show task pipelines across all active teams

subject: Add HITL controls to agent cards
description: Approve/reject/rewrite actions inline per agent
notes: HITL controls wired: pause/resume through HITLRelay, buffer viewer in detail panel, approve/reject buttons, PAUSED badge in fleet tree. Added buffered_messages/1, paused_sessions/0, reject/3 to HITLRelay.

subject: Non-blocking event pipeline validation
description: Load test hook events, verify no SQLite blocking

subject: Ash domain modeling refactor
description: Create Fleet and Activity Ash domains with resources backed by Ash.DataLayer.Simple. Extract prepare_assigns into DashboardState using Ash code interfaces.
notes: Steps 7-9: imported SessionControlHandlers+TmuxHandlers, extracted DashboardTmuxHandlers module (95 lines out), simplified apply/3 calls. DashboardAgentHealthHelpers layering inversion noted but all helpers still actively used. Clean compile.

subject: Register operator as permanent agent + rename dashboard to operator
description: AgentRegistry init registers operator agent. All from labels changed from dashboard to operator. PubSub subscription updated.

subject: Fix LoadMessages + detail panel + empty guards
description: Activity.Message now includes Mailbox ETS messages. Detail panel form uses dynamic ID. Empty content/target guards added.

subject: Merge /fleet and /protocols into single Fleet view
description: 3-column layout: fleet tree (360px, tree-line hierarchy) | comms timeline (flex, mailbox messages) | detail panel (400px, chain of command). Remove /protocols nav.

subject: Add fleet tree + comms helpers to command_components.ex
Add new assigns and events to dashboard_live.ex
Add project name above teams in fleet tree
Extract FleetHelpers module
description: Pure functions for fleet tree: role classification, hierarchy, chain of command, project grouping

subject: Fix command bar select frozen in phx-update=ignore
description: Select was inside phx-update=ignore div, never updated with new agents. Moved select outside, only text input wrapped.

subject: Document messaging architecture
description: Map all 5 message flow paths, PubSub topics, bypass routes, unification opportunities

subject: Unify all messaging through Gateway Router
description: Route EventController direct Mailbox calls and SessionControl direct CommandQueue calls through Gateway.Router.broadcast for consistent audit trail
notes: EventController handle_send_message now routes through Gateway.Router.broadcast. Debug endpoints added. Tmux pane delivery wired. Qualified agent naming. Stale sweep.

subject: Tmux multi-panel integration
description: User wants multi-tmux view with option to have multiple tmuxes open, not just single Tmux button
notes: Multi-panel tmux: tabbed + tiled layout. tmux_panels list, tmux_outputs map, tmux_layout toggle. Heartbeat refreshes all open sessions. Tab bar with session pills, Close Tab/All, Kill, Tile/Tabs toggle.

subject: Remove AccessStruct macro from all Ash resources
description: AccessStruct fetch/2 stripped by Ash before_compile hooks causing runtime UndefinedFunctionError. Removed from 5 resources, converted ~25 bracket access sites to dot access across 10+ files.

subject: Fix dropdown stability + message delivery fallback
description: Wrapped selects in phx-update=ignore. Added Operator.send fallback to direct Mailbox when Gateway returns 0 recipients. Fixed ProtocolTracker timeout (removed N+1 stats). Removed all polling.

subject: Create Heartbeat GenServer with Gateway integration
description: Observatory.Heartbeat publishes to PubSub heartbeat + Gateway fleet:heartbeat every 5s. Added to MonitorSupervisor. ProtocolTracker and LiveView subscribe to heartbeat instead of own timers.

subject: Fix layering inversion + extract dashboard handlers + wire feed view
description: Created Fleet.AgentHealth domain module (79 lines). Extracted DashboardPhase5Handlers (104 lines) and DashboardSlideoutHandlers (125 lines). Consolidated mount into DashboardState.default_assigns/1. dashboard_live.ex 887->458 lines. Wired FeedComponents.feed_view into command_view via Comms/Feed tab toggle.

subject: Conversation tracing (agent pair filter)
description: Filter comms by agent pair. Click Trace on agent in detail panel to filter. Click second agent to narrow to pair conversation. Violet pills in comms tab bar. Max 2 agents; clicking 3rd replaces.

subject: Cost dashboard UI
description: Add Costs tab to fleet control view showing token usage by model and agent from SQLite TokenUsage table

subject: Progressive agent nudging
description: NudgeEscalator GenServer with 4-level escalation (warn/nudge/pause/zombie) for stale agents

subject: Agent spawning via Operator
description: AgentSpawner creates tmux sessions with claude, writes overlay + hooks. Operator.spawn_agent/stop_agent public API

subject: Quality gate enforcement
description: QualityGate GenServer listens for TaskCompleted events, runs done_when command, nudges agent on failure

subject: Instruction overlays for spawned agents
description: InstructionOverlay.generate/1 creates per-agent CLAUDE.md with role/task/scope/gates/comms protocol

subject: Channel registry in Router
description: Replace hardcoded channel dispatch with runtime config. Channel behaviour gets channel_key/0 and optional skip?/1. Router iterates config :observatory, :channels list. All 3 adapters updated.

subject: PaneMonitor GenServer
description: Capture tmux pane output on heartbeat, parse OBSERVATORY_DONE/BLOCKED signals, broadcast on pane:signals topic. Makes hookless agents observable.

subject: Host + tree fields in AgentRegistry
description: Added host (default local), parent_id, children to agent entry. Foundation for distributed agents and flexible hierarchy.

subject: SSH tmux channel adapter
description: SshTmux channel adapter wrapping tmux commands in ssh user@host. Enables remote agent management.

subject: Agent tree tracking in spawn chain
description: Track parent_id/children on spawn. Scoped authority. Flexible hierarchy for master-coord->coord->lead->specialist patterns.

subject: Rename codebase from Observatory to ICHOR IV
description: Incremental rename: module names, config, branding, tmux socket path. Not a big-bang rename.
